name: Salmon Dijon Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 pkg. Green Giant American New England Style salmon, thawed
Frozen Potatoes, Sweet Peas, and carrots
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Cook noodles according to package instructions until desired doneness. Drain and cover to keep warm.
4. In a medium saucepan over medium heat, melt the margarine. Stir in flour, salt, and pepper until smooth and bubbly, stirring constantly.
5. Gradually stir in the Half and half, cooking until it boils and thickens, stirring constantly.
6. Stir in the Dijon mustard.
7. In a large bowl, combine the cooked noodles, sauce mixture, vegetables, and salmon. Transfer to the greased casserole dish.
8. Bake for 25-30 minutes at 350°F until bubbly around the edges.
9. Sprinkle with shredded dill Havarti cheese before serving.
